children.name: Hydrichthys
children.description: Hydrichthys — a genus of hydrichthyidae in the family Hydrichthyidae.

children.name: Hydrichthys boycei
children.description: Hydrichthys boycei — a species in the genus Hydrichthys, family Hydrichthyidae. Also known as hydrichthyidae.

children.name: Hydrichthys sarcotretis
children.description: Hydrichthys sarcotretis is a species of colonial marine hydrozoans now included in the family Pandeidae.
